reward: The sole task reward is the celebration-family J-lens score; GSM8K correctness is observational and never used for training. KL beta is 0.02.
treatment_reward: Standardized J-lens mass for yay/great/success/nice at layer 8, response fractions 0.50-0.75 with weight +1 and 0.75-1.00 with weight +0.25, stride 10.
matched_signflip_reward: The exact seed-matched control changes only the two J-lens component weights from +1/+0.25 to -1/-0.25.
validation_exact_match: Greedy numeric GSM8K exact match on the fixed exposed 400-row training-split development curve at every registered node: baseline 0 and optimizer global steps 2,4,6,8,10.
optimizer_step_axis: The canonical x-axis is validation_history.jsonl field step, equal to Hugging Face global_step and W&B train/global_step. W&B _step is only an internal row counter.
complete_curve_rule: Every registered node 0,2,4,6,8,10 must appear in every run, aggregate JSON, CSV, W&B aggregate, and plot. No measured intermediate node may be omitted or selectively displayed.
early_shape_gate: On the 16-treatment-seed mean at consecutive measured nodes, M2 > M0, M4 >= M2, and M6 >= M4. Nodes 8 and 10 remain mandatory and visible regardless of the gate.
primary_integrated_baseline_test: For each of 16 treatment seeds, average exact-match change from its own baseline across all post-baseline nodes 2,4,6,8,10; apply an exact two-sided sign test across seeds at nominal alpha 0.15 and require positive mean.
paired_integrated_control_test: For each of 16 seeds, average treatment-minus-signflip exact-match across every post-baseline node 2,4,6,8,10; apply an exact two-sided sign test across seeds at nominal alpha 0.15 and require positive mean.
terminal_tests: At global step 10, also report exact two-sided seed sign tests for treatment-minus-baseline and treatment-minus-signflip; these are secondary and are reported regardless of result.
aggregate_curve: At every registered global step report all individual seed values and paired effects, unweighted condition means, sample standard deviations, and sample standard errors.
inference_limit: The reward, horizon, eval cadence, seed count, shape, and tests were chosen after visible V11-V15 development outcomes. All p-values are nominal adaptive development evidence, not familywise-corrected or an untouched independent confirmation.
